title: Bloom Festal
description: Quirky weapons and healing staves to spice up combat!
body:
Bloom Festal adds various healing rods and weapons, inspired by Fire Emblem.

Healing Rods fire a healing orb that heals whoever it touches (other than the undead). 
- Bloom Festal is the weakest, Dawn Festal is stronger, and Twilight Festal is the strongest.
- Horizon Festal is weaker than Dawn Festal but has considerable range.
- Rather than summon a healing orb, Grand Festal instead heals all within 16 blocks of the user.

Some Rods inflict status effects:
- Revelation Rod inflicts 'Revelation', which inverts 'Healing' and 'Harming' effects.
  - If the target already has this status effect, it is removed instead.
- Silent Rod inflicts 'Silence', which prevents the usage of Magical Rods/Tomes.
- Hexing Rod inflicts 'Hexed', which halves max HP for 5 minutes.

Tomes fire a magical orb that deals damage and generally has some special effect.
- Equinox: Very slow and cumbersome, but whoever it hits will be left with just half a heart (lethal if already half a heart)
- Actinon: Summons lightning! Does not alter mobs or the environment; only does heavy damage.
- Tempest: Heavy knockback, and does extra damage against airborne mobs.
- Caldera: Sets hurt mobs on fire.

Weapons
- Actinon Sword: A fragile but powerful sword that can cast Actinon!
- Valor Lance: A spear with uniquely fast attack speed. Bypasses damage cooldowns.
- Vanguard Naginata: A mediocre spear that greatly boosts defenses.
